topic: Gate 3 classifier + skill-advisor routing accuracy research. Build ~200-prompt labeled corpus (anonymized real transcripts + synthetic edge cases). For each prompt, compute gate-3-classifier.ts classifyPrompt() verdict + skill_advisor.py top-1 recommendation. Compare to human ground truth. Report precision/recall/F1 per classifier. Enumerate error classes including known CLAUDE.md false-positive tokens (analyze, decompose, phase). Compute compound Gate 3 * skill-advisor joint error rate. Rank rule-change proposals with simulated before/after delta on labeled corpus. Dispatch on spec folder .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/019-system-hardening/001-initial-research/005-routing-accuracy/ with iteration budget 15.
